message.content:
@startuml
title POJO's Class Diagram

package "POJO" {
    class Employee <<C>> {
        + id : int
        - name : String
        # surname : String
        ~ bday : String
        * nationality : String
        $ dataSign : String
        % dataEnd : String
        ^ salary : int
        & phone : int
        | post : String
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        + Employee()
        - Employee()
        # getId()
        ~ getName()
        * getSurname()
        $ getNationality()
        % getDataSign()
        ^ getDataEnd()
        & getSalary()
        | getPhone()
        ! getPost()
        ? getSTName()
        < getSTSurname()
        > getSTBday()
        / getSTDataSign()
        \ getSTDataEnd()
        [ getSTSalary()
        ] getSTPost()
        } getSTNationality()
    }

    class GameStat <<C>> {
        + id : int
        - name : String
        # surname : String
        ~ start : int
        * substitutes : int
        $ goal : int
        % assist : int
        ^ opponent : String
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        + getId()
        - getName()
        # getSurname()
        ~ getStart()
        * getSubstitutes()
        $ getGoal()
        % getAssist()
        ^ getOpponent()
        & GameStat()
        | getTname()
        ! getsTSurname()
        ? getSTOPponent()
        < getStassist()
        > getstgoal()
        / gettstart()
        \ Getstsustitues()
    }

    class MyAlert <<C>> {
        -- Attributes are empty in this section for visual alignment if needed, or just methods below separator --
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        ShowalertError()
        showalrtinfo()
    }

    class Player <<C>> {
        + id : int
        - name : String
        # surname : String
        ~ bday : String
        * nationality : String
        $ datasign : string
        % Dataend : string
        ^ Salary : Int
        & Phone : INT
        | Price : INT
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        + GETID()
        - GetName()
        # GetsurnamE()
        ~ GEBDAY()
        * GEtnationaliyty()
        $ GetDataSighn()
        % gETDATAEND()
        ^ geTsalaRY()
        & GeTPRICE()
        | getphone()
        ! GSTNAME()
        ? Gstsurname()
        < gstbdaY()
        > gsTDATASIGNH()
        / GSdATAENDD()
        \ GTSSALARYy()
        [ gtspRIce()
        ] gtsnationaliTY()
        ) player()
        ( getPlayer()
    }

    class User <<C>> {
        Login : STRING
        Grand : sTRING
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        user()
        getlogin()
        getstLogin()
        getstgrand()
    }

    class Game <<C>> {
        + Id : INNT
        - Opponnet : STRIing
        # Competion : StrinGg
        ~ DATAA : STtring
        * Scoree : Innt
        $ scoreopponet : iNtt
        % Home : innTT
        
        -- Methods Section Separator --
        
        game()
        GAMEEE()
        getidD()
        getoptpnenent()
        getCompetitionnn()
        gdetaa()
        gescoreee()
        gestscoreoppoennett()
        gehomeeee()
        getstoppponnneennte()
        getstcompetittiooon()
        getstdatataaa()
        getsscorescoore()
        getscsccorescocreopooneenntte()
        getsthhomeeeee()
    }
}

@enduml
